narration: Greedy checks each day-to-day change and keeps every positive rise.
callout: The positive jumps here are 1 to 5 and 3 to 6.

narration: A rise from one day to the next is always safe to take in this problem.
decision: Adding all positive rises gives the same best total profit.

predictionPrompt.prompt: What should we do with a day-to-day price drop?

choices.label: Ignore that change
choices.feedback: Correct. Negative or zero changes do not add profit.

choices.label: Add it to the profit anyway
choices.feedback: Not this one. A drop does not help the profit.

narration: This greedy rule works because one long rise and all its small rising pieces add up to the same gain.
callout: That is why the local rule is trustworthy here.
